scenario: generic-files adapter placeNew(component, conceptId) → on-disk relative path. Placement is identity: the file keeps its natural path/extension. Mirrors placement/all-types.json's byType shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 (placeNew), §7 (generic-files row: indexes what it is pointed at).
realWorldSource: AKM-native fallback family — generic-files has no TYPE_DIRS; it places by identity
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. Because generic-files has no per-type subdir convention, placement is an IDENTITY join: the conceptId maps to its own path. `document` (markdown) appends .md; `script` and `file` keep the natural extension. RESOLVED (open question 5, maintainer resolution 2026-07): identity placement (natural path) is the FINALIZED convention for generic-files — no longer open for the adapter author.
